summary: Iteration 13 - Testing MASSIVE Quantica Engine Expansion. Backend: 37/37 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified working. New pages (Market Radar, Weekly Digest), Dashboard enhancements (Fear & Greed badge, Global Overview bar), and Portfolio AI Optimize button all functional.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/quantica/fear-greed returns composite_score (0-100), label, color, 7 components, 30-day history
Backend: GET /api/quantica/anomalies returns 8 anomalies with id, type, severity, asset, title, detail, confidence, critical_count
Backend: GET /api/quantica/trading-signals returns 15 signals sorted by confidence with entry/stop_loss/target/risk_reward
Backend: GET /api/quantica/market-radar returns biggest_gainers, biggest_losers, unusual_volume, trending sections
Backend: GET /api/quantica/correlation-matrix returns 10x10 matrix with diagonal=1.0 (BTC,ETH,SOL,NVDA,AAPL,GOLD,OIL,SPY,QQQ,PBR)
Backend: POST /api/quantica/optimize-portfolio accepts positions and returns AI analysis with before/after scores (GPT-5.2)
Backend: GET /api/quantica/weekly-digest returns digest text, week_number, fear_greed, top_performers (GPT-5.2)
Backend: GET /api/intelligence/market-pulse returns REAL data (source: live) from CoinGecko + Twelve Data
Backend: GET /api/intelligence/global-overview returns equity/crypto/gold/forex market caps
Backend: Regression - daily-briefing, geopolitical-risk, portfolio endpoints still working
Frontend: Dashboard shows Fear & Greed badge (58 NEUTRAL)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Global Markets overview bar (Equities $110T, Crypto $2.60T, Gold $16T, FX $7.5T, BTC Dom 56.7%)
Frontend: Dashboard Market Pulse shows REAL prices (S&P 500: 669, NASDAQ: 600, NVDA: 183, AAPL: 252, GOLD: 5,014)
Frontend: AI Quantica Engine page loads with 4 tabs (Market Radar, AI Signals, Anomaly Detector, Correlation Matrix)
Frontend: Market Radar tab shows Biggest Gainers (MSTR +12.2%, SOL +9.7%), Losers (NKE -8.1%), Unusual Volume, Trending
Frontend: AI Signals tab shows 15 trading signals with STRONG BUY/SELL badges, entry/stop/target prices
Frontend: Anomaly Detector tab shows 8 anomalies (NVDA volume spike, BTC whale transfer, TSLA options, etc.)
Frontend: Correlation Matrix tab shows 10x10 asset correlation heatmap with color coding
Frontend: Weekly Digest page has Generate Digest button and Podcast Version button (GPT-5.2 + TTS)
Frontend: Portfolio page has AI Optimize button
Frontend: Portfolio shows Health Score ring (73 Good), Total Value ($100.0K), Market Performance Highlights
Frontend: Navigation sidebar shows all new pages (AI Quantica Engine, Weekly Digest)
critical_code_review_comments: Fear & Greed Index uses simulated component scores — in production these would come from real market data APIs
Anomaly data is curated sample data — in production would integrate with real volume/whale tracking APIs
Trading signals are AI-generated with realistic parameters but confidence/recommendations are simulated
Market Radar data (gainers/losers/volume) is curated — real implementation would use live market data feeds
Correlation matrix uses semi-realistic correlations but is randomized — production would calculate from historical returns
Portfolio Optimizer and Weekly Digest use real GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key (15-30 second response time)
Market Pulse fetches REAL prices from CoinGecko (crypto) and Twelve Data (stocks/forex/commodities)
Global Overview crypto_market_cap may be 0 if CoinGecko is rate limited — fallback values provided
Gold price (~$5,018) comes from XAU/USD Twelve Data forex pair which is correct
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user - no new seed data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested MASSIVE Quantica Engine expansion. New endpoints: /api/quantica/fear-greed (composite Fear & Greed Index 0-100), /api/quantica/anomalies (8 market anomalies), /api/quantica/trading-signals (15 AI signals with entry/stop/target), /api/quantica/market-radar (gainers/losers/volume/trending), /api/quantica/correlation-matrix (10x10 asset correlation), /api/quantica/optimize-portfolio (GPT-5.2 portfolio analysis), /api/quantica/weekly-digest (GPT-5.2 weekly report). /api/intelligence/market-pulse now returns REAL data from CoinGecko + Twelve Data (source: live). /api/intelligence/global-overview provides global market caps. Frontend: MarketRadarPage at /market-radar with 4 tabs, WeeklyDigestPage at /weekly-digest with generate+podcast buttons, PortfolioPage has AI Optimize button, DashboardPage has Fear & Greed badge and Global Markets overview bar. Skip voice briefing by setting localStorage 'aureos_last_voice_briefing' to today's date string. All previous iteration features remain functional.

mocked_components.note: Some data is SIMULATED, but AI endpoints use real GPT-5.2
simulated_data: Fear & Greed component scores (simulated market indicators)
real_integrations: Portfolio Optimizer: GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key
Weekly Digest: GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key
Daily Briefing: GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All new Quantica Engine features working correctly.
